attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
     MNL.ADJ_CODE,
     MNL.ADJ_TYPE,
     CAST('1900-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
     MNL.CREATION_DATE,     
     COALESCE (MNL.DEAL_ID, 'UNKNOWN'), /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS ETL_PROCESS_DTM,
     MNL.EU_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.EU_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.EU_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.EU_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.EU_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.EU_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,  
     MNL.ORDER_DATE,
     MNL.ORDER_LINE_ID,   
     MNL.ORDER_QUANTITY,
     MNL.PART_NUMBER,
     MNL.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
     MNL.SERVICE_TYPE,
       MNL.BILL_TO_PARTY_ID,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_NAME,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_CITY,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_STATE,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
       MNL.BILL_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.SHIP_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.SHIP_TO_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_CITY,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_COUNTRY,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_NAME,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_POSTAL_CODE,
     MNL.SOLD_CUST_STATE,
     MNL.SOLD_TO_PARTY_ID,
     MNL.SOURCE_CREATION_DATE, /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
     MNL.TRX_ID,
     MNL.TRX_NUMBER,
    MNL.TRX_ORIG_CODE,
     MNL.TRX_SOURCE_TYPE, 
     HIST.TRX_TYPE_CODE,  /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
     HIST.TRX_USAGE_CODE ,   /*  ADDED  AS PART OF  D1FY14*/
     MNL.UNIT_COST,
     MNL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
     MNL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
     UUSR.USER_NAME AS UPLOADED_USER,         /*  Added as part of DEC Release 2013 */
     AUSR.USER_NAME AS APPROVED_USER ,    /*  Added as part of DEC Release 2013 */ 
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_1,'UNKNOWN'),    /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_2,'UNKNOWN'),    /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_3,'UNKNOWN'),    /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_4,'UNKNOWN'),    /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.ATTRIBUTE_5,'UNKNOWN'),    /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.PRODUCT_FAMILY,'UNKNOWN'), /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(MNL.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER,'UNKNOWN') AS RESELLER_PO_NUM, /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       COALESCE(FLV.ATTRIBUTE5,'=')  AS Reporting_Type,  /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
       MNL.ADJ_INITIATOR,  /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
        COALESCE(MNL.DESCRIPTION,'UNKNOWN') AS COMMENTS,
      /*  Added as part of IDE Terirement Q1FY15 */
 COALESCE(MNL.TRX_SOURCE_CODE,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(MNL.ADJUST_TO_PERIOD,DATE '3500-01-01'),
 COALESCE(MNL.CONTRACT_START_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01'),
 COALESCE(MNL.CONTRACT_END_DATE, DATE '3500-01-01'),
 MNL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
 /* ADDED THE BELOW COLUMNS AS PART OF Q3FY16 RELEASE */
  COALESCE(MNL.OCAT_HDR_ID,-999),
 COALESCE(MNL.OCAT_FILE_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
 COALESCE(MNL.PROGRAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN'),
  COALESCE(TRX.END_USER_OTM_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
COALESCE(TRX.SHIP_TO_OTM_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
COALESCE(TRX.SOLD_TO_OTM_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
COALESCE(TRX.BILL_TO_OTM_CUSTOMER_ID,-999),
/* Added as part of Q3FY17*/
COALESCE(MNL.REPORTING_DIST, -999),
SALES_MOTION,
TERM
     FROM
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_TRX 
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) MNL
     /*ADDED THE BELOW JOIN AS PART OF MARCH 2016 RELEASE */
 INNER JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_PARTIES 
        QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1)TRX 
  ON MNL.TRX_ID=TRX.TRX_ID
 INNER JOIN 
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXOTM_PHX_TRX_HISTORY
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  TRX_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) HIST
 ON MNL.TRX_ID=HIST.TRX_ID
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_USER
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  USER_NAME,USER_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) UUSR
 ON  MNL.CREATED_BY=UUSR.USER_ID
 INNER JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_USER
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  USER_NAME,USER_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) AUSR
 ON MNL.LAST_UPDATED_BY=AUSR.USER_ID
 LEFT JOIN
 (SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_LOOKUP_VALUES
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  LOOKUP_CODE,LOOKUP_TYPE,LANG,SECURITY_GROUP_ID,VIEW_APPLICATION_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1) FLV
 ON MNL.ADJ_CODE=FLV.LOOKUP_CODE
 AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE='XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_TRANS_TYPE'
 WHERE
 MNL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))-interval '2' hour
 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.FND_LOOKUP_VALUES  FLV /* FILTERING OUT XAAS DATA Q3FY15*/
 where  MNL.ADJ_CODE=FLV.LOOKUP_CODE
 AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE='XXOTM_PHX_MANUAL_TRANS_TYPE'  
 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 ='BACKEND'
 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE1='XAAS Transaction')
 AND 1=2
